rules: Headings strictly use Chivo. Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
All financial data, tickers, and percentages MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Small overlines or section headers should be uppercase, text-xs, with tracking-[0.2em].
Use grid borders (border-collapse style) to separate sections rather than floating cards.
Maximized screen usage; no decorative white space; every pixel is for data.
Optical alignment: align numeric data to the right, text to the left.
Use 100vh layout for the main application shell. Avoid page scrolling; use side panels, scrollable columns, and tabs for data density.
Mobile-first applies but this is an enterprise desktop-heavy application. Optimize for large screens (lg:grid-cols-4 or more).

components.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow

buttons.style: Solid sharp edges, monochromatic unless it's a primary action. Primary uses accent_primary.
buttons.hover: Slight brightness increase, no translation (keep it rigid).

navigation.style: Dense side navigation panel or top bar with solid background.
navigation.active_state: Left or bottom border highlight with accent color.

charts.style: Minimalist axes, color based on data trend (positive/negative), thin stroke widths (1px or 2px), zero decorative backgrounds.

data_tables.style: Dense, text-sm or text-xs, border-b on rows, subtle highlight row on hover, fixed header. Right-align numbers.

motion_and_interaction.philosophy: Instantaneous and precise. Tools for experts don't waste time on animations.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Immediate color or background change, no transition delays.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA > 60 for normal text. > 45 for large text. High contrast is a priority.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

icons.style: Thin or regular weight, sharp edges.

hero_background.description: Grayscale architectural abstract for login or blank states

data_placeholder.description: Abstract radial pattern for complex AI data states

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-viewport, dense dashboard matching a modernized 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic.
Install the required font families: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Install chart library: yarn add recharts
Use 'Control Room Grid' layouts: dense, gap-4, covering the whole screen. No scrolling in the main layout wrapper (h-screen).
Rely heavily on 'JetBrains Mono' for tickers, market data, and portfolio metrics.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo'.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout with 'Grid Borders' (border-r, border-b on sections, thin rgba(255,255,255,0.12) lines).
Avoid the Shadcn Card component if it adds too much padding; use custom div containers with tight padding and sharp corners.
Implement real-time feeling components: sparklines, dense data tables, and high-contrast metric summaries.
For the market analysis & portfolio risk assessment sections, use Recharts with monochromatic themes, highlighting anomalies in Signal Red or Positive Green.
Never use full-screen gradients. Keep colors muted except for crucial data indicators (red/green).

Ensure the layout can accommodate AI-Powered Market Analysis, Portfolio Optimization, Financial Document Analysis, and Real-time Dashboard functionalities in a highly dense, tabbed or grid-based view.
